message:
test(alloc_budget): add 41 edge-case tests for sequential leak detector (bd-1ebai)

Cover config defaults/clone/debug, all accessor methods (mean/sigma/
threshold/frames/cusum_lower), reset-and-reuse, EvidenceEntry clone/
debug/JSONL formatting, LeakAlert no_alert/clone/debug, warmup boundary
and zero-warmup, NaN/Infinity inputs, oscillating values, very large/
small values, simultaneous detector triggers, CUSUM recovery after
transient spike, e-process growth under H1, ledger field accuracy,
Lcg determinism/centering, negative observations, Welford mean accuracy,
and custom config combinations (high alpha, small lambda).

60 total tests (19 existing + 41 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
